title: eranthemum parviflorum
intro: Eranthemum parviflorum, also known as the dwarf eranthemum or dwarf lantana, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eranthemum parviflorum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken to harness its medicinal properties.
